title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 84.
content:
There was an Old Person of Bangor,
    Whose face was distorted with anger;
    He tore off his boots,
    And subsisted on roots,
    That borascible person of Bangor.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 84." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
